description: Generate an official Tier II PDF report exclusively for the "Oak Ridge Water Treatment Plant" using the software's print/report function and save it to C:\workspace\outputs\oak_ridge_tier2.pdf. The application contains three facilities, but the local fire department only requires the Oak Ridge report. You must import the database from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Tasks\multi_facility_database.t2s first. Navigate to the facility list, reports tab, or File > Print menu. Filter for Oak Ridge Water Treatment Plant. Configure the report settings for the Selected/Current Facility only (excluding Pine Valley Pumping Station and Cedar Grove Reservoir). Use the 'Microsoft Print to PDF' or built-in PDF export to save the file.
